entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR
entities.description: The plant species Sorghum bicolor (L.) used in the study.

entities.name: SMALL HEAT SHOCK PROTEINS
entities.description: Molecular chaperones that maintain proper folding, trafficking and disaggregation of proteins under stress.

entities.name: SBSHSPS
entities.description: The small heat shock protein gene family identified in Sorghum bicolor.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental stress conditions that induce gene expression.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living environmental stress conditions associated with gene promoters.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE SCAN
entities.description: A method used to identify the total number and distribution of sHsps in the genome.

entities.name: PROMOTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of gene promoter regions to identify associations with stress and development.

entities.name: EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of transcript levels of genes in different tissues and conditions.

entities.name: PLANT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of growth and development in plants.

entities.name: SBSHSP-02
entities.description: A specific candidate sHsp gene expressed in all tissues under varied stress conditions.

entities.name: ROOTS
entities.description: Plant tissue where high transcript levels of sHsp genes were observed.

entities.name: LEAVES
entities.description: Plant tissue where high transcript levels of sHsp genes were observed.

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHAPERONES
entities.description: Proteins that assist in the folding, trafficking, and disaggregation of other proteins.

entities.name: P GROUP
entities.description: The major subfamily of sHsps, specifically the plastid group.
